spec_match.rationale: The repaired lab probes the baseline LoAF fields and the origin-trial split fields with forced duration read from PerformanceScriptTiming records.

interactive.rationale: The intensity slider and style, layout, combined, and clear buttons update live support cards, LoAF result cards, and fallback measurements.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The concept and feature-index blurbs now describe the same baseline-versus-origin-trial field split shown on the page.

edge_cases.rationale: The browser state where split fields are absent is surfaced explicitly while still showing styleAndLayoutStart and scripts[].forcedStyleAndLayoutDuration fallback data.

references.rationale: The page cites the ChromeStatus feature link for 5171478175809536.

design_system.rationale: The repaired page uses CSS variables, no source inline styles or event handlers, and paired button background/color rules.

summary: Open critique items repaired. DevTools MCP verification exercised the workload intensity slider plus style recalc, layout thrash, combined work, and clear controls at http://localhost:3000/v147/long-animation-frames-style-duration/compatibility-lab/?verify=after-loaf-style-fix. Chrome 148 captured LoAF entries, showed baseline fields as available, reported entry.styleDuration/layoutDuration and script forced split fields as not exposed, and displayed performance.measure() fallback timings. Console and network were clean; conformance now honestly reports 4 baseline PASS and 4 origin-trial FAIL in this browser.
